content_body: This was our 2nd stay in this amazing cabin (more like a lodge) on the Toccoa River near Blue Ridge. Much thanks to Gary with Cabin Rentals of Georgia for making this trip possible for our family. Gary is always available, knowledgeable, and professional to his guest. It's not a surprise why Gary has some of the most exclusive properties in the North GA mountains.  The owners have tastefully decorated the home with antiques, hunting & fishing wildlife items, and upscale yet rustic comfortable furniture. Built by a local premier builder, the attention to detail, custom wood and stone work, make this home stand out above all others. The home is very spacious with a privacy friendly layout including 3 floors of bedrooms. The back of the home has walls of windows that take in the beauty of the River as well as the mountains in the background. There is also an amazing covered deck that spans the entire length of the back of the house and includes a stone fireplace. There is a spacious backyard that is flat to the river and is great for family activities. My family made many great memories for years to come and this home has quickly become our favorite when staying in the Blue Ridge area.  Thanks for another outstanding experience!
title: Lifetime Memories Made Along the Toccoa River
